name: Fallout New Vegas: You Only Live Once
original_name: Fallout New Vegas: You Only Live Once
overview: Many A True Nerd walks through Fallout New Vegas: You Only Live Once, possibly the hardest challenge ever attempted in Fallout: New Vegas - a permadeath run with no healing allowed.

trailers.title: Fallout New Vegas: You Only Live Once - Part 1 - Welcome to Goodsprings
